name: codex-smart-router
description: Semantic LLM-based per-turn model and reasoning router for Codex CLI

scripts.test: node --test test/router.test.mjs test/classifier.test.mjs test/proxy.test.mjs test/audit.test.mjs test/dashboard.test.mjs
scripts.check: node --check bin/codex-smart.mjs && node --check src/router.mjs && node --check src/classifier.mjs && node --check src/catalog.mjs && node --check src/proxy.mjs && node --check src/audit.mjs && node --check src/dashboard.mjs && node --check src/dashboard-server.mjs
